_comment: Envico CareOS 2026 — Referral Intake Workflow. Import via n8n > Workflows > Import from File.
name: Envico CareOS — Referral Intake

nodes.name: Webhook — POST /referral-intake
nodes.notes: Entry point. POST JSON body to this endpoint. Configure n8n base URL + this path for your n8n webhook URL.

nodes.name: Parse Input Fields
nodes.notes: Outputs: service_user_name, dob, referral_source, referrer_name, referrer_contact, support_needs, urgency_level, received_at

nodes.name: Validate Required Fields
nodes.notes: Adds _valid (boolean) and _errors (string[]) to the payload. IF node branches on _valid.

nodes.name: Validation Passed?
nodes.notes: true branch (output 0) → Generate Referral ID. false branch (output 1) → Respond Validation Error.

nodes.name: Respond — Validation Error

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Validation failed', details: $json._errors }) }}

nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 400. Example: { success: false, error: 'Validation failed', details: ['service_user_name is required'] }

nodes.name: Generate Referral ID
nodes.notes: Produces referral_id e.g. ENV-REF-2026-T7KX4M. Strips validation metadata before DB operations.

nodes.name: DB — Insert Referral

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO referrals (
  reference_number,
  referrer_name,
  referrer_organisation,
  referrer_email,
  client_name,
  client_dob,
  care_type,
  urgency,
  status,
  notes
) VALUES (
  '{{$json.referral_id}}',
  NULLIF('{{$json.referrer_name}}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{$json.referral_source}}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{$json.referrer_contact}}', ''),
  '{{$json.service_user_name}}',
  NULLIF('{{$json.dob}}', '')::DATE,
  'domiciliary',
  '{{$json.urgency_level}}',
  'received',
  NULLIF('{{$json.support_needs}}', '')
)
RETURNING id, reference_number;

nodes.notes: Inserts into referrals table. NULLIF handles empty strings as NULL. RETURNING provides the DB uuid (id) for downstream nodes.

nodes.name: DB — Create Task

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO tasks (
  title,
  description,
  task_type,
  entity_type,
  entity_id,
  priority,
  status,
  due_date
) VALUES (
  'Review new referral — {{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.referral_id }}',
  'New referral received for {{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.service_user_name }}. Source: {{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.referral_source }}. Urgency: {{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.urgency_level }}. Please review and assign.',
  'review',
  'referral',
  '{{$json.id}}',
  CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.urgency_level }}' = 'emergency' THEN 'urgent'
    WHEN '{{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.urgency_level }}' = 'urgent'    THEN 'high'
    ELSE 'medium'
  END,
  'open',
  CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.urgency_level }}' = 'emergency' THEN NOW() + INTERVAL '2 hours'
    WHEN '{{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.urgency_level }}' = 'urgent'    THEN NOW() + INTERVAL '24 hours'
    ELSE NOW() + INTERVAL '72 hours'
  END
)
RETURNING id;

nodes.notes: Creates a manager review task. Due date is auto-calculated from urgency: emergency=2h, urgent=24h, standard=72h. entity_id links to referrals.id.

nodes.name: DB — Notify Manager

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO notifications (
  recipient_id,
  title,
  body,
  notification_type,
  entity_type,
  entity_id,
  channel,
  is_read,
  status
)
SELECT
  u.id,
  'New Referral: {{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.referral_id }}',
  'A new referral has been received for {{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.service_user_name }}. Urgency: {{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.urgency_level }}. Source: {{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.referral_source }}. Please review and assign.',
  'referral',
  'referral',
  '{{ $('DB — Insert Referral').item.json.id }}',
  'in_app',
  false,
  'pending'
FROM users u
WHERE u.role IN ('manager', 'admin')
  AND u.is_active = true
RETURNING id;

nodes.notes: Inserts one notification row per active manager/admin. Uses SELECT FROM users to fan out. Channel defaults to in_app — add email/telegram variants as needed.

nodes.name: DB — Audit Log

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_logs (
  action,
  entity_type,
  entity_id,
  new_values
) VALUES (
  'create',
  'referral',
  '{{ $('DB — Insert Referral').item.json.id }}',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'reference_number', '{{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.referral_id }}',
    'client_name',      '{{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.service_user_name }}',
    'referral_source',  '{{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.referral_source }}',
    'urgency',          '{{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.urgency_level }}',
    'status',           'received',
    'created_via',      'webhook',
    'received_at',      '{{ $('Generate Referral ID').item.json.received_at }}'
  )
)
RETURNING id;

nodes.notes: Immutable audit entry. jsonb_build_object keeps new_values structured for querying. user_id left null as this is a system/webhook action — extend if auth is added.

nodes.name: Respond — Success
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 201 Created. Example: { success: true, referral_id: 'ENV-REF-2026-T7KX4M', client_name: 'Jane Smith', urgency: 'standard', status: 'received' }
